description: Regression anchor thresholds for domain expertise benchmark evaluation. These represent minimum acceptable scores for the BCI + knowledge pack pipeline.

behavior_adherence.description: Fraction of expected behaviors correctly cited in response

citation_accuracy.description: Precision of behavior citations (cited behaviors that are relevant)

hallucination_rate.description: Fraction of responses containing fabricated behavior references

mean_reciprocal_rank.description: MRR of the first correct behavior in the retrieval ranking

ndcg_at_5.description: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at K=5 for behavior retrieval

ndcg_at_10.description: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at K=10 for behavior retrieval

docs.note: Documentation tasks should have high adherence due to clear behavior triggers

implementation.note: Implementation tasks may invoke multiple behaviors; lower threshold acceptable

testing.note: Testing behaviors are well-defined with clear keyword triggers

migration.note: Migration tasks have strong keyword signals (alembic, schema, migrate)

deployment.note: Deployment tasks may overlap with config and incident categories

incident.note: Incident tasks require fast, accurate behavior retrieval

general.note: General tasks have weaker signals; lower threshold acceptable

phase_planning.note: GEP planning phase tests phase-aware BCI; multi-behavior retrieval

phase_implementing.note: GEP implementing phase requires context-aware behavior selection

phase_reviewing.note: GEP reviewing phase should reliably trigger compliance behaviors

phase_completing.note: GEP completing phase should trigger documentation and deploy behaviors

negative.note: Negative examples must not trigger behavior retrieval

multi_behavior.note: Multi-behavior tasks test recall of all relevant behaviors

difficulty_multipliers.description: Apply multiplier to per-category thresholds based on difficulty. Easy tasks should exceed thresholds; hard tasks have more lenient expectations.

pack_bci_vs_baseline.description: Pack+BCI strategy must beat baseline by these margins

bci_only_vs_baseline.description: BCI-only strategy must beat baseline by these margins

token_efficiency.description: BCI should ideally reduce tokens; at worst increase by 15%
